title: selaginella nummulariifolia
intro: Selaginella nummulariifolia, also known as the coin leaf spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella nummulariifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, although more research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy and safety.
